title: Ore Blocks Now Smelting
description: Smelt entire ore blocks — copper, iron, gold, and more! This lightweight mod lets you smelt raw ore blocks directly into ingots. No crafting table, no extra steps — just drop copper, iron, gold, or other ore blocks into a furnace and enjoy faster, cleaner
body: Smelt entire ore blocks — copper, iron, gold, and more! This lightweight mod lets you smelt raw ore blocks directly into ingots. No crafting table, no extra steps — just drop copper, iron, gold, or other ore blocks into a furnace and enjoy faster, cleaner resource processing. Ideal for automation builds, speedruns, or players who value simplicity and efficiency.
